title: The Health Halo Fallacy
description: Investigated whether packaged foods at perceived healthy grocery store, Whole Foods, are truly healthy.

title: NYPD `Bad Apples`
description: Brutality allegations in the NYPD can be attributed to a few bad officers, according to this data, and several deceptive techniques.

title: Systemic Brutality in the NYPD
description: Police brutality is a systemic issue in the NYPD.

title: Regional Sleep Deserts: How and Why Do They Exist?
description: Investigated what factors are the biggest indicators of regional sleep deserts.

title: Happiness Index in Rural vs Urban Areas
description: Studied the difference in resident happiness between rural and urban landscapes across the world.

title: Detecting Drowsy vs Alert Drivers From EEG Signal Data
description: Detected differences in the theta/beta ratio of drowsy and alert drivers.

title: A/B Testing of Advertisement Effectiveness
description: Used A/B hypotheiss testing to determine the casual impact of digital advertisements.

title: VR Data Cleaning & Analysis
description: Developed a piepline to clean, analyze, and visualize experimental virtual reality data to support lab research on top-down processing.
